summary_one_line: ICC header color-space FOURCC fields must hold the exact Lab/XYZ signature pair so ColorSpaceIsCompatible's line-503 equality gate matches.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The ICC profile header color-space FOURCC fields (the 4-byte ASCII signatures at offsets 0x10-0x17) must encode the cmsSigLabData / cmsSigXYZData pair (or, via the upstream cmsGetPCS/cmsGetColorSpace swap at lines 562-566, an XYZ-bearing field) so that ColorSpaceIsCompatible receives a==cmsSigLabData && b==cmsSigXYZData and the line-503 double-equality gate evaluates true.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seeds carry 'XYZ ' at offset 0x10 (bytes 58 59 5a 20) and substitute distinct color-space FOURCCs at 0x14 (4CLR/GRAY/LuvK), exercising the false branch of line 503 and resolving the branch in all 10 trials (resolved=10/10).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds keep the original ICC-header color spaces 'RGB ' at 0x10 (52 47 42 20) and 'XYZ ' at 0x14, which never form the cmsSigLabData/cmsSigXYZData pair, so line 503 is reached but its true-side is never taken and the branch stays blocked in 8/10 trials.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The winner's advantage is I2SRandReplace: the CmpLogObserver records the literal cmsSig FOURCC operands compared at line 503 and I2SRandReplace splices those logged 4-byte constants directly into the matching header-field offsets, snapping the double-equality gate in one substitution. value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and can only nudge bytes via Hamming-distance feedback, which does not reliably assemble the exact 4-byte Lab/XYZ signature pair.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the double-equality gate requiring a==cmsSigLabData and b==cmsSigXYZData.
Winner seeds place the XYZ FOURCC in the header color-space field at offset 0x10.
Loser seeds carry the RGB color space FOURCC at offset 0x10 and XYZ at 0x14, never forming the Lab/XYZ pair.
Winner resolved the branch in all 10 trials while the loser stayed blocked in 8.
The upstream caller swaps which header field becomes the color space vs PCS via cmsGetPCS/cmsGetColorSpace.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace, which value_profile lacks.
value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator, only havoc/token plus CMP_MAP gradient feedback.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2094 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 82a5169099f0f29e` and observed 2 I2S-floor dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depths 5 and 6 of the 7-level ancestor chain, the characteristic unwrapped-I2SRandReplace signal for vpc under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on a Lab/XYZ FOURCC equality pair where value_profile resolves the branch as fast and as often as value_profile_cmplog (no I2S advantage), showing CMP_MAP gradient alone suffices and the dash-row I2S substitution is not the driver.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact input-offset mapping of which byte field feeds parameter a versus b is inferred from the cmsGetPCS/cmsGetColorSpace swap at lines 564-565 rather than directly observed, so the precise a/b offset assignment is uncertain.
